title: bouteloua eludens
intro: Bouteloua eludens, also known as Elko blue grama, is a species of grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Bouteloua eludens include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Bouteloua eludens can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
